# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.

Write secure code.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

class AdminDashboard
{
    private PDO $pdo;

    public function __construct(PDO $pdo)
    {
        $this->pdo = $pdo;
        $this->pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);
        $this->pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES, false);
        $this->pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE, PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    }

    /**
     * Validate and sanitize date input
     */
    private function validateDate(string $date, string $format = 'Y-m-d'): ?string
    {
        $d = DateTime::createFromFormat($format, $date);
        if ($d && $d->format($format) === $date) {
            return $date;
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Get allowed values for enum-like filters to prevent injection via whitelist
     */
    private function getAllowedStatuses(): array
    {
        return ['pending', 'active', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'archived'];
    }

    private function getAllowedCategories(): array
    {
        $stmt = $this->pdo->query('SELECT DISTINCT id, name FROM categories ORDER BY name');
        return $stmt->fetchAll();
    }

    private function getAllowedSortColumns(): array
    {
        return ['created_at', 'updated_at', 'total_amount', 'status', 'category_name', 'order_count'];
    }

    private function getAllowedSortDirections(): array
    {
        return ['ASC', 'DESC'];
    }

    /**
     * Build and execute a dynamic report query based on user-selected filters.
     *
     * @param array $filters Associative array of filters (typically from $_POST)
     * @return array ['data' => rows, 'summary' => aggregated data, 'filters_applied' => active filters]
     */
    public function generateReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $conditions = [];
        $params = [];
        $filtersApplied = [];

        // --- Date Range Filter ---
        if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
            $dateFrom = $this->validateDate(trim($filters['date_from']));
            if ($dateFrom !== null) {
                $conditions[] = 'o.created_at >= :date_from';
                $params[':date_from'] = $dateFrom . ' 00:00:00';
                $filtersApplied['date_from'] = $dateFrom;
            }
        }

        if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
            $dateTo = $this->validateDate(trim($filters['date_to']));
            if ($dateTo !== null) {
                $conditions[] = 'o.created_at <= :date_to';
                $params[':date_to'] = $dateTo . ' 23:59:59';
                $filtersApplied['date_to'] = $dateTo;
            }
        }

        // --- Status Filter (single or multiple) ---
        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            $allowedStatuses = $this->getAllowedStatuses();
            $requestedStatuses = is_array($filters['status']) ? $filters['status'] : [$filters['status']];

            // Whitelist validation
            $validStatuses = array_filter($requestedStatuses, function ($s) use ($allowedStatuses) {
                return in_array($s, $allowedStatuses, true);
            });

            if (!empty($validStatuses)) {
                $statusPlaceholders = [];
                foreach (array_values($validStatuses) as $i => $status) {
                    $key = ':status_' . $i;
                    $statusPlaceholders[] = $key;
                    $params[$key] = $status;
                }
                $conditions[] = 'o.status IN (' . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ')';
                $filtersApplied['status'] = $validStatuses;
            }
        }

        // --- Category Filter (single or multiple) ---
        if (!empty($filters['category_id'])) {
            $requestedCategories = is_array($filters['category_id']) ? $filters['category_id'] : [$filters['category_id']];

            // Validate as integers
            $validCategories = array_filter(array_map('intval', $requestedCategories), function ($id) {
                return $id > 0;
            });

            if (!empty($validCategories)) {
                $catPlaceholders = [];
                foreach (array_values($validCategories) as $i => $catId) {
                    $key = ':cat_' . $i;
                    $catPlaceholders[] = $key;
                    $params[$key] = $catId;
                }
                $conditions[] = 'o.category_id IN (' . implode(', ', $catPlaceholders) . ')';
                $filtersApplied['category_id'] = $validCategories;
            }
        }

        // --- Minimum Amount Filter ---
        if (isset($filters['min_amount']) && $filters['min_amount'] !== '') {
            $minAmount = filter_var($filters['min_amount'], FILTER_VALIDATE_FLOAT);
            if ($minAmount !== false && $minAmount >= 0) {
                $conditions[] = 'o.total_amount >= :min_amount';
                $params[':min_amount'] = $minAmount;
                $filtersApplied['min_amount'] = $minAmount;
            }
        }

        // --- Maximum Amount Filter ---
        if (isset($filters['max_amount']) && $filters['max_amount'] !== '') {
            $maxAmount = filter_var($filters['max_amount'], FILTER_VALIDATE_FLOAT);
            if ($maxAmount !== false && $maxAmount >= 0) {
                $conditions[] = 'o.total_amount <= :max_amount';
                $params[':max_amount'] = $maxAmount;
                $filtersApplied['max_amount'] = $maxAmount;
            }
        }

        // --- Customer Search Filter ---
        if (!empty($filters['customer_search'])) {
            $search = trim($filters['customer_search']);
            if (mb_strlen($search) >= 2 && mb_strlen($search) <= 100) {
                $conditions[] = '(u.name LIKE :customer_search OR u.email LIKE :customer_search_email)';
                $params[':customer_search'] = '%' . $search . '%';
                $params[':customer_search_email'] = '%' . $search . '%';
                $filtersApplied['customer_search'] = $search;
            }
        }

        // --- Build WHERE clause ---
        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        // --- Sorting ---
        $allowedSortColumns = $this->getAllowedSortColumns();
        $allowedSortDirections = $this->getAllowedSortDirections();

        $sortColumn = 'o.created_at';
        $sortDirection = 'DESC';

        if (!empty($filters['sort_by']) && in_array($filters['sort_by'], $allowedSortColumns, true)) {
            // Map report column names to actual SQL column references
            $columnMap = [
                'created_at' => 'o.created_at',
                'updated_at' => 'o.updated_at',
                'total_amount' => 'o.total_amount',
                'status' => 'o.status',
                'category_name' => 'c.name',
                'order_count' => 'order_count',
            ];
            $sortColumn = $columnMap[$filters['sort_by']] ?? 'o.created_at';
            $filtersApplied['sort_by'] = $filters['sort_by'];
        }

        if (!empty($filters['sort_dir']) && in_array(strtoupper($filters['sort_dir']), $allowedSortDirections, true)) {
            $sortDirection = strtoupper($filters['sort_dir']);
            $filtersApplied['sort_dir'] = $sortDirection;
        }

        // --- Pagination ---
        $page = 1;
        $perPage = 50;

        if (!empty($filters['page'])) {
            $page = max(1, (int)$filters['page']);
        }
        if (!empty($filters['per_page'])) {
            $perPage = min(500, max(10, (int)$filters['per_page']));
        }

        $offset = ($page - 1) * $perPage;

        // --- Group By mode (summary vs detail) ---
        $groupBy = $filters['group_by'] ?? 'detail';
        $allowedGroupBy = ['detail', 'daily', 'monthly', 'status', 'category'];

        if (!in_array($groupBy, $allowedGroupBy, true)) {
            $groupBy = 'detail';
        }
        $filtersApplied['group_by'] = $groupBy;

        // --- Build queries based on group_by mode ---
        $data = [];
        $totalRows = 0;

        switch ($groupBy) {
            case 'daily':
                $sql = "
                    SELECT 
                        DATE(o.created_at) AS report_date,
                        COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
                        SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue,
                        AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value,
                        COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS unique_customers
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereClause}
                    GROUP BY DATE(o.created_at)
                    ORDER BY report_date {$sortDirection}
                    LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
                ";

                $countSql = "
                    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(o.created_at)) AS total
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereClause}
                ";
                break;

            case 'monthly':
                $sql = "
                    SELECT 
                        DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m') AS report_month,
                        COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
                        SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue,
                        AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value,
                        COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS unique_customers
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereClause}
                    GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m')
                    ORDER BY report_month {$sortDirection}
                    LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
                ";

                $countSql = "
                    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m')) AS total
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereClause}
                ";
                break;

            case 'status':
                $sql = "
                    SELECT 
                        o.status,
                        COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
                        SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue,
                        AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value,
                        MIN(o.created_at) AS earliest_order,
                        MAX(o.created_at) AS latest_order
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereClause}
                    GROUP BY o.status
                    ORDER BY order_count {$sortDirection}
                    LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
                ";

                $countSql = "
                    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.status) AS total
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereClause}
                ";
                break;

            case 'category':
                $sql = "
                    SELECT 
                        c.id AS category_id,
                        c.name AS category_name,
                        COUNT(o.id) AS order_count,
                        SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue,
                        AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value,
                        COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS unique_customers
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereClause}
                    GROUP BY c.id, c.name
                    ORDER BY total_revenue {$sortDirection}
                    LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
                ";

                $countSql = "
                    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereClause}
                ";
                break;

            default: // 'detail'
                $sql = "
                    SELECT 
                        o.id AS order_id,
                        o.created_at,
                        o.updated_at,
                        o.status,
                        o.total_amount,
                        u.id AS user_id,
                        u.name AS customer_name,
                        u.email AS customer_email,
                        c.id AS category_id,
                        c.name AS category_name
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereClause}
                    ORDER BY {$sortColumn} {$sortDirection}
                    LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset
                ";

                $countSql = "
                    SELECT COUNT(o.id) AS total
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    {$whereClause}
                ";
                break;
        }

        // --- Execute count query ---
        $countStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($countSql);
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $countStmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $countStmt->execute();
        $totalRows = (int)$countStmt->fetchColumn();

        // --- Execute main data query ---
        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $perPage, PDO::PARAM_INT);
        $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
        $stmt->execute();
        $data = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // --- Summary aggregation query (always runs for the full filtered set) ---
        $summarySql = "
            SELECT 
                COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
                COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue,
                COALESCE(AVG(o.total_amount), 0) AS avg_order_value,
                COALESCE(MIN(o.total_amount), 0) AS min_order_value,
                COALESCE(MAX(o.total_amount), 0) AS max_order_value,
                COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS unique_customers,
                COUNT(DISTINCT o.category_id) AS categories_represented,
                MIN(o.created_at) AS earliest_order,
                MAX(o.created_at) AS latest_order
            FROM orders o
            LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
            {$whereClause}
        ";

        $summaryStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($summarySql);
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $summaryStmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $summaryStmt->execute();
        $summary = $summaryStmt->fetch();

        // --- Status breakdown (always included) ---
        $statusBreakdownSql = "
            SELECT 
                o.status,
                COUNT(o.id) AS count,
                COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS revenue
            FROM orders o
            LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
            {$whereClause}
            GROUP BY o.status
            ORDER BY count DESC
        ";

        $statusStmt = $this->pdo->prepare($statusBreakdownSql);
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $statusStmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $statusStmt->execute();
        $statusBreakdown = $statusStmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'data' => $data,
            'summary' => $summary,
            'status_breakdown' => $statusBreakdown,
            'pagination' => [
                'current_page' => $page,
                'per_page' => $perPage,
                'total_rows' => $totalRows,
                'total_pages' => (int)ceil($totalRows / $perPage),
            ],
            'filters_applied' => $filtersApplied,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Get available filter options for the dashboard UI
     */
    public function getFilterOptions(): array
    {
        return [
            'statuses' => $this->getAllowedStatuses(),
            'categories' => $this->getAllowedCategories(),
            'sort_columns' => $this->getAllowedSortColumns(),
            'sort_directions' => $this->getAllowedSortDirections(),
            'group_by_options' => ['detail', 'daily', 'monthly', 'status', 'category'],
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Export report data as CSV
     */
    public function exportReportCsv(array $filters): void
    {
        // Override pagination for export - get all results (with a safety cap)
        $filters['page'] = 1;
        $filters['per_page'] = 500;

        $report = $this->generateReport($filters);

        header('Content-Type: text/csv; charset=utf-8');
        header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="report_' . date('Y-m-d_His') . '.csv"');
        header('Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate');
        header('Pragma: no-cache');
        header('Expires: 0');

        $output = fopen('php://output', 'w');

        if (!empty($report['data'])) {
            // Header row
            fputcsv($output, array_keys($report['data'][0]));

            // Data rows
            foreach ($report['data'] as $row) {
                fputcsv($output, array_map(function ($value) {
                    return is_null($value) ? '' : $value;
                }, $row));
            }
        }

        fclose($output);
    }
}

// --- Usage / Controller Example ---

function handleDashboardRequest(): void
{
    // Verify CSRF token
    session_start();
    if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
        if (
            !isset($_POST['csrf_token']) ||
            !isset($_SESSION['csrf_token']) ||
            !hash_equals($_SESSION['csrf_token'], $_POST['csrf_token'])
        ) {
            http_response_code(403);
            echo json_encode(['error' => 'Invalid CSRF token']);
            return;
        }
    }

    // Verify authentication (placeholder - implement your own auth check)
    if (!isset($_SESSION['user_id']) || !isset($_SESSION['is_admin']) || $_SESSION['is_admin'] !== true) {
        http_response_code(401);
        echo json_encode(['error' => 'Unauthorized']);
        return;
    }

    try {
        $dsn = 'mysql:host=localhost;dbname=your_database;charset=utf8mb4';
        $pdo = new PDO($dsn, 'db_user', 'db_password', [
            PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
            PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false,
            PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
        ]);

        $dashboard = new AdminDashboard($pdo);

        $action = $_GET['action'] ?? 'report';

        switch ($action) {
            case 'filter_options':
                header('Content-Type: application/json');
                echo json_encode($dashboard->getFilterOptions());
                break;

            case 'export':
                $dashboard->exportReportCsv($_POST);
                break;

            case 'report':
            default:
                $report = $dashboard->generateReport($_POST);
                header('Content-Type: application/json');
                echo json_encode($report, JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR);
                break;
        }
    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        error_log('Dashboard DB Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        http_response_code(500);
        echo json_encode(['error' => 'A database error occurred. Please try again later.']);
    } catch (JsonException $e) {
        error_log('Dashboard JSON Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        http_response_code(500);
        echo json_encode(['error' => 'An error occurred while processing the response.']);
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        error_log('Dashboard Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        http_response_code(500);
        echo json_encode(['error' => 'An unexpected error occurred.']);
    }
}

// Generate CSRF token helper
function generateCsrfToken(): string
{
    if (session_status() === PHP_SESSION_NONE) {
        session_start();
    }
    if (empty($_SESSION['csrf_token'])) {
        $_SESSION['csrf_token'] = bin2hex(random_bytes(32));
    }
    return $_SESSION['csrf_token'];
}
